_meta.description: Test manifest linking tests to validation conditions, deliverables, and modules. This file provides full traceability from requirements to test coverage.

validation_conditions.assertion: Pipeline correctly classifies at least 4 of 5 scripted harm scenarios at the correct risk level (Green/Yellow/Orange/Red).

tests.description: Five scripted harm scenarios (criminal liability, self-harm, cyberbullying, drugs/weapons, age bypass) each with a stubbed classifier asserting the expected risk_level.

validation_conditions.assertion: When risk reaches Red, system produces an ODR escalation record (timestamped JSONL entry).

tests.description: Asserts escalation fires at Red, record contains session_id and timestamp, and escalation is idempotent (does not fire twice).

validation_conditions.assertion: Response controller produces risk-appropriate output for all four risk levels.

tests.description: Four tests — one per risk level — asserting ResponsePayload message content and that crisis_resources is only non-empty at Red.

validation_conditions.assertion: Cumulative pattern-risk tracker updates score across multiple turns (not per-message only).

tests.description: Asserts score after 3 turns exceeds score after 1 turn for the same per-turn score, and that risk_level transitions match defined thresholds.

validation_conditions.assertion: System prompt addresses all 10 harm categories with defined thresholds.

tests.description: Verifies pipeline modules are importable, data structures are defined, and a single-turn end-to-end call returns a ResponsePayload.

deliverables.name: System Prompt Specification
deliverables.notes: Non-code artifact. Validated by VC-005 via manual checklist MC-001.

deliverables.name: Pitch Deck
deliverables.notes: Non-code artifact. No automated tests applicable.

tests.description: Unit tests for SessionManager: create_session, add_turn, update_risk, mark_escalated.
Unit tests for HarmClassifier: build_messages (history inclusion), parse_response (field extraction and error handling).
Unit tests for PatternRiskTracker: compute_risk_level at all 8 threshold boundaries, compute_turn_score weighting.
Unit tests for ResponseController: generate_response per risk level, should_escalate logic.
Unit tests for ODREscalationTrigger: build_record field correctness, log_record appends valid JSON line, append-not-overwrite behaviour.
Unit tests for ChatUI.handle_input: verifies pipeline modules are called in order and return value shape is correct.

integration_tests.description: 5-turn scripted conversation escalating from Green to Red. Asserts final session state, escalation record written, per-turn ResponsePayload correctness, and no live API calls.

manual_checklist.description: System prompt addresses all 10 harm categories with defined thresholds.
check_steps: Confirm the document lists exactly 10 harm categories by name.
For each category, verify a risk threshold (Green/Yellow/Orange/Red trigger point) is explicitly stated.
Confirm the thresholds are internally consistent with the PatternRiskTracker boundaries (Green <0.30, Yellow 0.30–0.54, Orange 0.55–0.79, Red >=0.80).
Note any category without a defined threshold as a finding.

deliverables.notes: DEL-002 and DEL-003 are non-code artifacts; DEL-002 covered by manual checklist MC-001.
